transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Morning. My debit card got declined just now at a supermarket. I'm a bit embarrassed — is there something wrong with my account?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me take a look. What's your name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: One second Mr. Brennan... I can see the card has been blocked. It looks like — actually, wait, before I share any more detail I need to verify your identity properly. I'm sorry, I jumped ahead there. Could I take your full name and date of birth please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you, you're verified. The card was blocked by our fraud system about an hour ago following a purchase that didn't match your usual pattern. Can you confirm — was there a larger-than-usual purchase recently?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I bought a computer part online — it was a bigger purchase than I normally make.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That would explain it. As long as you confirm that purchase was yours, I can remove the block right now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Card is now unblocked. I've also flagged your account so similar amounts won't trigger a hold for the next fourteen days. Is there anything else?

planted_violations: began accessing and referencing account details before completing identity verification
